script: TS=$(date +%s); for B in emily-claude neil-claude stephanie-claude; do F=/home/azureuser/${B}-responder.py; echo "========== $B =========="; BEFORE=$(grep -c '^def _post_reply_orig_protect' $F); echo "  before: $BEFORE definitions"; cp -f $F $F.bak-recursion-$TS; python3 -c "import re; src=open('$F').read(); fixed=re.sub(r'^def _post_reply_orig_protect\(chat_id, text\):\n    return _post_reply_orig_protect\(chat_id, _redact_passwords_protect\(text\)\)\n', '', src, flags=re.MULTILINE); open('$F','w').write(fixed)"; AFTER=$(grep -c '^def _post_reply_orig_protect' $F); echo "  after:  $AFTER definitions"; if [ "$AFTER" = "1" ]; then sudo systemctl restart ${B}-responder.service && echo '  restarted: '$(systemctl is-active ${B}-responder.service); else echo '  >>> EDIT FAILED — restoring backup'; cp -f $F.bak-recursion-$TS $F; fi; echo; done
